name: PER_PHONES
description: This table stores phone numbers of different types for a person.

columns.Name: PHONE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation code derived from Legal Entity.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Date the phone number becomes effective

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Date the phone number stops being effective

columns.Name: PHONE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the phone type for which the details are stored.

columns.Name: PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Telephone number. Not marked as mandatory in order to always allow creation of a first phone row for every person even when phone number is not provided.

columns.Name: SPEED_DIAL_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Speed Dial Number of the Phone Number being created or updated.

columns.Name: AREA_CODE
columns.Comments: Area Code of the Phone Number being created or updated.

columns.Name: SEARCH_PHONE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Derived column for internal use.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: VALIDITY
columns.Comments: Valid times that this phone number can be used

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: COUNTRY_CODE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Country code of the Phone Number

columns.Name: EXTENSION
columns.Comments: Extension number

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person for whom this phone number  is recorded
